songs.title: M-M-Moon!
songs.lyrics:
[Intro]
M! M! M-m-m!
(mmm… mmm…)

[Hook]
M! M! M-m-m!
What begins with M?
M-m-moon! M-m-moon!
It's a moon! (a moon!)

[Verse 2]
M! M! M-m-m!
What begins with M?
M-m-mouse! M-m-mouse!
It's a mouse! (a mouse!)

[Verse 3]
M! M! M-m-m!
What begins with M?
M-m-monkey! M-m-monkey!
It's a monkey! (a monkey!)

[Verse 4]
M! M! M-m-m!
What begins with M?
M-m-mop! M-m-mop!
It's a mop! (a mop!)

[Bridge]
A potato?! (NO!)
P-p-potato! Not M!
(mmm… mmm…)

[Outro]
M-m-mat! M-m-mat!
It's a mat! (a mat!)
M! M! M-m-m!
songs.sunoStyle: dark trap, 68 bpm, heavy 808 bass, sparse hi-hats, deep whisper-rap verses, kids choir chant on hook, playful spooky, minimal, clean vocals, nursery trap
songs.sunoNotes: The M sound is a pure closed-lips hum /m/ — NEVER 'em' (letter name) and NEVER 'muh' (schwa). The '(mmm… mmm…)' lines are a long humming drone over the 808. Answer line 'It's a ___!' reuses the Week 1 frame.

songs.title: On the Mat
songs.lyrics:
[Hook]
On the mat! On the mat!
What is on the mat?
The moon is on the mat! (the moon?!)
The moon is on the mat!

[Verse 2]
On the mat! On the mat!
What is on the mat?
The mouse is on the mat! (a mouse?!)
The mouse is on the mat!

[Verse 3]
On the mat! On the mat!
What is on the mat?
The monkey is on the mat! (a monkey?!)
The monkey is on the mat!

[Verse 4]
On the mat! On the mat!
What is on the mat?
Sejeena is on the mat! (Sejeena!)
Sejeena is on the mat!

[Outro]
A potato is on the mat!
(POTATO!)
On the mat! On the mat!
(shhh…)
songs.sunoStyle: dark trap, 68 bpm, heavy 808 bass, sparse hi-hats, deep whisper-rap verses, kids choir chant on hook, playful spooky, minimal, clean vocals, nursery trap
songs.sunoNotes: Sing the girl's name as 'Sejeena' (phonetic). One frame only: 'The ___ is on the mat.' — a single word swaps per verse. Kids choir answers the (…?!) echoes.

spreads.text:
A mat.
What is on the mat?
spreads.artNote: An empty woven floor mat under a spotlight, inviting, slightly mysterious.

spreads.text: The moon is on the mat!
spreads.artNote: A glowing full moon impossibly resting on the little mat — the first surreal laugh.

spreads.text: The mouse is on the mat!
spreads.artNote: A tiny mouse sitting proudly dead-center on the mat.

spreads.text: The monkey is on the mat!
spreads.artNote: A monkey mid-bounce on the mat, limbs everywhere.

spreads.text: The mop is on the mat!
spreads.artNote: A mop lying flat on the mat like it is napping.

spreads.text: The mango is on the mat!
spreads.artNote: One ripe mango, perfectly centered, absurdly dignified.

spreads.text: The mask is on the mat!
spreads.artNote: A festival mask propped upright on the mat, looking at the reader.
Segina the peg-doll girl (black pigtails, red dress) sitting cross-legged on the mat, happy.

spreads.text: And… a POTATO is on the mat!
spreads.artNote: The potato. On the mat. Spotlight. Maximum drama. Segina peeking in from the edge.

sentences: The moon is on the mat.
The mouse is on the mat.
The monkey is on the mat.
extras: Moveable alphabet: build a-t, m-a-t, a-m with sandpaper letters a, t, m
Oral preposition game with the mat: on / under / next to

teacherFocus: Blend the first words: a-t → at, m-a-t → mat, a-m → am with sandpaper letters and the moveable alphabet. Oral prepositions (on / under / next to) with the real classroom mat. Last teacher-read book — next week they read it themselves.
